'''鈭歵-h-s''' ('''tahasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coddle|coddle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-h-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coddle|coddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-h-s
|-
! Lemma
| tahasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tahasithi|tahasithi]] || [[word:tahasiji|tahasiji]] || [[word:tahasishi|tahasishi]] || [[word:tahasi|tahasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tahasuthuth|tahasuthuth]] || [[word:tahasujuj|tahasujuj]] || [[word:tahasushush|tahasushush]] || [[word:tahas|tahas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tahasuthu|tahasuthu]] || [[word:tahasuju|tahasuju]] || [[word:tahasushu|tahasushu]] || [[word:tahasu|tahasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tahasufuth|tahasufuth]] || [[word:tahasufuj|tahasufuj]] || [[word:tahasufush|tahasufush]] || [[word:tahasuf|tahasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tahasethe|tahasethe]] || [[word:tahaseje|tahaseje]] || [[word:tahaseshe|tahaseshe]] || [[word:tahase|tahase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tahasothoth|tahasothoth]] || [[word:tahasojoj|tahasojoj]] || [[word:tahasoshosh|tahasoshosh]] || [[word:tahas|tahas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tahasotho|tahasotho]] || [[word:tahasojo|tahasojo]] || [[word:tahasosho|tahasosho]] || [[word:tahaso|tahaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tahasofoth|tahasofoth]] || [[word:tahasofoj|tahasofoj]] || [[word:tahasofosh|tahasofosh]] || [[word:tahasof|tahasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tahas忙th忙|tahas忙th忙]] || [[word:tahas忙j忙|tahas忙j忙]] || [[word:tahas忙sh忙|tahas忙sh忙]] || [[word:tahas忙|tahas忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tahasathath|tahasathath]] || [[word:tahasajaj|tahasajaj]] || [[word:tahasashash|tahasashash]] || [[word:tahas|tahas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tahasatha|tahasatha]] || [[word:tahasaja|tahasaja]] || [[word:tahasasha|tahasasha]] || [[word:tahasa|tahasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tahasafath|tahasafath]] || [[word:tahasafaj|tahasafaj]] || [[word:tahasafash|tahasafash]] || [[word:tahasaf|tahasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:tahasasha|tahasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gotahasasha|gotahasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokitahasasha|gokitahasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:tahasn眉sha|tahasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gotahasnkn眉sha|gotahasnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokitahasn眉sha|gokitahasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tahash毛sha|tahash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotahasnksh毛sha|gotahasnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitahash毛sha|gokitahash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tahasrosha|tahasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotahasnkrosha|gotahasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitahasrosha|gokitahasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tahasmusha|tahasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gotahasnkmusha|gotahasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitahasmusha|gokitahasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:tahasherasha|tahasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gotahasnksherasha|gotahasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokitahasherasha|gokitahasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:tahasngasha|tahasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gotahasnkngasha|gotahasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokitahasngasha|gokitahasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tahasyasha|tahasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gotahasnkyasha|gotahasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokitahasyasha|gokitahasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:tahasyamasha|tahasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gotahasnkyamasha|gotahasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokitahasyamasha|gokitahasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:tahasn眉sh毛sha|tahasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotahasnkn眉sh毛sha|gotahasnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitahasn眉sh毛sha|gokitahasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tahasn眉rosha|tahasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotahasnkn眉rosha|gotahasnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitahasn眉rosha|gokitahasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tahasn眉musha|tahasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotahasnkn眉musha|gotahasnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitahasn眉musha|gokitahasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:tahash毛n眉sha|tahash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotahasnksh毛n眉sha|gotahasnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitahash毛n眉sha|gokitahash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tahash毛rosha|tahash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotahasnksh毛rosha|gotahasnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitahash毛rosha|gokitahash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tahash毛musha|tahash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotahasnksh毛musha|gotahasnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitahash毛musha|gokitahash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:tahasron眉sha|tahasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotahasnkron眉sha|gotahasnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitahasron眉sha|gokitahasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:tahasrosh毛sha|tahasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotahasnkrosh毛sha|gotahasnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitahasrosh毛sha|gokitahasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tahasromusha|tahasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotahasnkromusha|gotahasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitahasromusha|gokitahasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:tahasmun眉sha|tahasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotahasnkmun眉sha|gotahasnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitahasmun眉sha|gokitahasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:tahasmush毛sha|tahasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotahasnkmush毛sha|gotahasnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitahasmush毛sha|gokitahasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tahasmurosha|tahasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotahasnkmurosha|gotahasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitahasmurosha|gokitahasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:tahas|tahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:t忙h忙s|t忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hotahas|hotahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hot忙h忙s|hot忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotahas|hohotahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohot忙h忙s|hohot忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉tahas|n眉tahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉t忙h忙s|n眉t忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉tahas|n眉n眉tahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉t忙h忙s|n眉n眉t忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂tahas|n茂tahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂t忙h忙s|n茂t忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂tahas|n茂n茂tahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂t忙h忙s|n茂n茂t忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lutahas|lutahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lut忙h忙s|lut忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutahas|lulutahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulut忙h忙s|lulut忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:litahas|litahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lit忙h忙s|lit忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitahas|lilitahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilit忙h忙s|lilit忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kotahas|kotahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kot忙h忙s|kot忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotahas|kokotahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokot忙h忙s|kokot忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ketahas|ketahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ket忙h忙s|ket忙h忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketahas|keketahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keket忙h忙s|keket忙h忙s]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
